description: Load a velocyto .loom (which carries spliced/unspliced layers) into a single AnnData .h5ad. When a processed Scanpy .h5ad is supplied, merge its metadata (UMAP, clusters) onto the velocity layers via scv.utils.merge.
rules: read-only input — writes a new data.h5ad under record_store, never overwrites the input
optional PROCESSED merges a Scanpy .h5ad (UMAP/clusters) onto the velocyto layers
input must carry spliced/unspliced layers (velocyto / STARsolo / kallisto|bustools output)
usage: Set INPUT (velocyto .loom or .h5ad). Optional: PROCESSED (Scanpy .h5ad). Output: data.h5ad.
limitation: Requires scvelo (and scanpy for --processed merge) installed; without it the porter writes a {} placeholder data.h5ad and still passes.
